news.t: Prospera Funds Inc. Launches Prospera Income ETF (THRV) Listed on Nasdaq

overview.description: The Prospera Income ETF (THRV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, seeking income and capital preservation by investing in closed-end funds (CEFs) that holds equity and/or fixed-income securities. The fund is diversified across sectors, market capitalizations and valuations, currencies, credit ratings, and countries. THRV was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Prospera Funds.
